code: import{useAuth}from"../context/AuthContext";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ProfilePage=_ref=>{let{copied,onCopyMemberId}=_ref;const{user}=useAuth();if(!user)return null;const initials=(user.name||"U").split(" ").map(p=>p.charAt(0)).join("").slice(0,2).toUpperCase();return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card profile-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"profile-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"profile-avatar",children:initials}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Profile"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"profile-subtitle",children:"Account information and identity details"})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"profile-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:user.name})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"profile-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Email"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:user.email})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"profile-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Member ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("code",{className:"id-code",children:user.memberId||"----"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"profile-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Role"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`role-tag ${user.role==="Admin"?"role-admin":"role-member"}`,children:user.role})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"copy-id-btn",onClick:onCopyMemberId,children:copied?"Copied":"Copy Member ID"})]});};export default ProfilePage;
